_comment: Emulator-only Firebase config used by the verify harness (scripts/verify/verify.mjs starts the suite with --config firebase.emulator.json). The permissive firestore.rules lives here — NOT in firebase.json — so `firebase deploy` can never publish allow-all rules to the live project. To run the emulator manually: firebase emulators:start --only firestore,auth --project demo-kinda-fun --config firebase.emulator.json
